testcase.name: Homepage › Page Rendering › should load homepage successfully
Homepage › Page Rendering › should display hero section
Homepage › Page Rendering › should display published pages section
Homepage › Navigation › should have editor link
Homepage › Navigation › should navigate to editor when clicked
Homepage › Published Pages Display › should show published pages if available
Homepage › Published Pages Display › should have preview button for published pages
Homepage › Published Pages Display › should have view button for published pages
Homepage › Accessibility › should have no accessibility violations
Homepage › Accessibility › should have proper heading hierarchy
Homepage › Accessibility › should have alt text on images
Homepage › Accessibility › should have accessible links
Homepage › Accessibility › should have sufficient color contrast
Homepage › Responsive Design › should be responsive on mobile
Homepage › Responsive Design › should be responsive on tablet
Homepage › Responsive Design › should be responsive on desktop
Homepage › Performance › should load in reasonable time
Preview Pages › Preview Rendering › should render preview page
Preview Pages › Preview Rendering › should show back button
